offline_security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' data: blob:; connect-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src blob:; child-src blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none';

limitations: Embedded third-party OCR/PDF libraries contain license and implementation text. Runtime request capture, rather than string matching alone, is the authoritative application-network check.
